subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One beareth witness to that which God Himself testified before the creation of earth and heaven - that there is none other God but Him, the All-Subduing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد شهد المظلوم بما شهد الله قبل خلق الارض و السماء انه لا اله الا هو المهیمن
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @call to action, @thankfulness; gratitude
